name: Lemon-Pepper Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red bell pepper; cut into 1/4-inch strips
1/3 cup Diagonal slices celery (about 1 small stalk)
1 cup Green onion pieces with tops (about 3)
recipeInstructions:
Cook squash, bell pepper, celery, and onions in oil in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat about 2 minutes, stirring frequently, until bell pepper is crisp-tender. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cook about 1 minute, stirring frequently, until pea pods are hot.
6 servings.
Microwave Directions: Mix all ingredients except pea pods in a 1-1/2-quart microwavable casserole. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 3 minutes. Stir in pea pods. Cover tightly and microwave for 1 to 3 minutes or until pea pods are hot.
A package (6 ounces) of frozen Chinese pea pods, thawed, can be substituted for the fresh pea pods.
